sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41113" key="e)pisumba/llomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισυμ-βάλλομαι</orth>, <sense id="n41113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐπὶ νοῦν β.</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1609.tlg001:24J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phylarch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24J.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
